description: Advanced plot features: plotting from function definitions and discontinuous plots with holes/excluded points. For piecewise functions use piecewiseplot(), for implicit curves use implicitplot(), for parametric curves use paraplot().
utility: Plot funcdef-based functions and functions with holes/excluded points

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Function expression as a quoted ASCII math string, a function reference, or a string variable

arguments.name: range
arguments.description: Optional domain restriction for the x range

alternates.description: Plot with an open circle at the excluded x-value using piecewiseplot

examples.scenario: Plot with a hole at x=1
Plot from function definitions with parameter variable
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,3), 30, 30, type(plotting))
a = -1
f(x) = x^2 + a
g(x) = sin(x)
h(x) = f(x) + g(x)
plot(G, h)
